calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Ivy Tseng, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Shoreview Apartments, LP.
Crystal Ivy Franks, the Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Samantha Lee.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 24, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Shoreview Apartments, LP, and against defendant Samantha Lee as follows:

Plaintiff Shoreview Apartments, LP shall recover from defendant Samantha Lee Holdover Damages in the amount of $248.31 and Costs in the amount of $315.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $563.31.

Plaintiff Shoreview Apartments, LP is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 63 Peatrice Lane, #4, San Francisco, CA 94124. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Frank Drago, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Department 218)

Appearances:
Crystal Ivy Frank, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Shoreview Appartments, LP
Attorney, Jane L. Creason, appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Samantha Lee, is not present.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The settlement conference is off calendar because the defendant failed to appear. The trial date of October 14, 2007 remains on calendar.
